title: rubus × ruralis
intro: Rubus × ruralis, a hybrid of the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus plants, is a type of bramble or blackberry that grows in various parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Rubus × ruralis lie in its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × ruralis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and improving cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × ruralis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
